inferred_constraints: 2 <= garbage.length <= 1e5; garbage[i] consists of 'M','P','G'; 1 <= garbage[i].length <= 10; travel.length == garbage.length - 1; 1 <= travel[i] <= 100
input_format: line1: garbage (JSON array of strings); line2: travel (JSON array)

testcases.desc: Stress: large n near max boundary
